\tzpentry{ID4468}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4468 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$D(\omega) = \sum_{n} \delta(\omega - \omega_n) \equiv \frac{V_{\text{core}} \cdot \omega^2}{2\pi^2 c^3} \cdot \left( 1 + \eta_{\text{topo}} \cdot \text{det}(J_p) \right) \cdot \chi_T$$
